# Kpu-admin

> 杰出的管理系统框架

开箱即用，提供舒适开发体验

## Table of Contents

### 内建组件

#### 基础版

- [KaAlert 提示](/components/basic/KaAlert.md)

- [KaButtonGroup 按钮组](/components/basic/KaButtonGroup.md)
- [KaCard 卡片](/components/basic/KaCard.md)
- [KaCheckbox 复选框](/components/basic/KaCheckbox.md)
- [KaCheckboxGroup 复选框组](/components/basic/KaCheckboxGroup.md)
- [KaCollapsible 折叠面板](/components/basic/KaCollapsible.md)
- [KaContextMenu 右键菜单](/components/basic/KaContextMenu.md)
- [KaDescriptions 描述列表](/components/basic/KaDescriptions.md)
- [KaDivider 分割线](/components/basic/KaDivider.md)
- [KaDrawer 抽屉](/components/basic/KaDrawer.md)
- [KaDropdown 下拉菜单](/components/basic/KaDropdown.md)
- [KaFileUpload 文件上传](/components/basic/KaFileUpload.md)
- [KaFixedBar 固定栏](/components/basic/KaFixedBar.md)
- [KaHoverCard 悬浮卡片](/components/basic/KaHoverCard.md)
- [KaIcon 图标](/components/basic/KaIcon.md)
- [KaImagePreview 图片预览](/components/basic/KaImagePreview.md)
- [KaImageUpload 图片上传](/components/basic/KaImageUpload.md)
- [KaInput 输入框](/components/basic/KaInput.md)
- [KaInputOTP 验证码输入](/components/basic/KaInputOtp.md)
- [KaKbd 键盘按键](/components/basic/KaKbd.md)
- [KaKbdGroup 键盘组合](/components/basic/KaKbdGroup.md)
- [KaLabel 标签](/components/basic/KaLabel.md)
- [KaModal 对话框](/components/basic/KaModal.md)
- [KaNumberField 数字输入框](/components/basic/KaNumberField.md)
- [KaPageHeader 页面头部](/components/basic/KaPageHeader.md)
- [KaPageMain 页面主内容区](/components/basic/KaPageMain.md)
- [KaPagination 分页](/components/basic/KaPagination.md)
- [KaPasswordStrength 密码强度](/components/basic/KaPasswordStrength.md)
- [KaPopover 弹出框](/components/basic/KaPopover.md)
- [KaProgress 进度条](/components/basic/KaProgress.md)
- [KaRadioGroup 单选组](/components/basic/KaRadioGroup.md)
- [KaScrollArea 滚动区域](/components/basic/KaScrollArea.md)
- [KaSearchBar 搜索栏](/components/basic/KaSearchBar.md)
- [KaSelect 选择器](/components/basic/KaSelect.md)
- [KaSlider 滑块](/components/basic/KaSlider.md)
- [KaSwitch 开关](/components/basic/KaSwitch.md)
- [KaTabs 标签页](/components/basic/KaTabs.md)
- [KaTag 标签](/components/basic/KaTag.md)
- [KaTextarea 文本域](/components/basic/KaTextarea.md)
- [KaToast 轻提示](/components/basic/KaToast.md)
- [KaTooltip 文字提示](/components/basic/KaTooltip.md)

- [KaLayoutContainer 布局容器](/components/pro/KaLayoutContainer.md)
- [KaLinkPreview 链接预览](/components/pro/KaLinkPreview.md)
- [KaLoading 加载动画](/components/pro/KaLoading.md)
- [KaMarquee 滚动横幅](/components/pro/KaMarquee.md)
- [KaMention 提及](/components/pro/KaMention.md)
- [KaMultiStepLoader 多步骤加载器](/components/pro/KaMultiStepLoader.md)
- [KaParticlesBg 粒子背景](/components/pro/KaParticlesBg.md)
- [KaPatternBg 图案背景](/components/pro/KaPatternBg.md)
- [KaQrcode 二维码](/components/pro/KaQrcode.md)
- [KaScratchOff 刮刮乐](/components/pro/KaScratchOff.md)
- [KaScrollingText 滚动文字](/components/pro/KaScrollingText.md)
- [KaSmoothSwipe 平滑滑动](/components/pro/KaSmoothSwipe.md)
- [KaSparklesText 闪耀文字](/components/pro/KaSparklesText.md)
- [KaSparkline 迷你图](/components/pro/KaSparkline.md)
- [KaSpotlightCard 聚光灯卡片](/components/pro/KaSpotlightCard.md)
- [KaSteps 步骤条](/components/pro/KaSteps.md)
